calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Status Report
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Adasiewicz for (administrator) Christina Loo.

Mr. Adasiewicz reported that Ms. Loo called him yesterday at 2:53 p.m. stating that she would not attend the hearing, that it was a difficult conversation as she was not communicative, that there was no caller I.D. to obtain a telephone number, that she has apparently received the courts orders and that he does not know where she is. The Court stated that Ms. Loo has failed to respond to the Orders to Appear, to provide an accounting and to close the estate, that there is property in the estate and that there is a creditor, that Mr. Adasiewicz is unable to close the estate without Ms. Loo's cooperation, that the Court will close the estate and order that Ms. Loo be surcharged the entire value.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts . (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Continued To Dec-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Adasiewicz for (administrator) Christina Loo.

The Court stated that Mr. Woo is not present today and asked if Mr. Adasiewicz has heard from him. Mr. Adasiewicz stated that he has not heard anything, that he received a letter stating that Ms. Lai has passed away, that he has heard nothing from Ms. Loo and does not know where she is. The Court stated that it will continue the matter one last time with notice to Ms. Loo, that the Court will close the estate and surcharge Ms. Loo the entire value of the estate and will consider appropriate sanctions for her contempt, that there will be a judgment against her in the amount of $211,377.00 and that it appreciates the efforts of Mr. Adasiewics. The status of filing a petition for final distribution, the Order to Appear and the Order to Show Cause were continued to December 15, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Continued To Dec-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Continued To Dec-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Status Report
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Continued To Nov-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Adasiewicz for (administrator) Christina Loo. Warren Woo for (creditor) Laura Lai.

The Court stated that this is a troublesome case, that it still needs a petition for final distribution and that Ms. Loo has failed to appear. Mr. Adasiewicz stated that he has not heard from Ms. Loo since before the last hearing. Mr. Woo stated that he is present because of a message he received from the probate examiner regarding problems with the estate, that his client is in line to petition as successor administrator but that it is not likely she will do so. The Court stated that there is no way to pay Ms. Lai without someone stepping in, and that it is ultimately up to Ms. Lai. Mr. Woo asked about the possibility of the Public Administrator taking over and the Court responded that it was not likely. Mr. Woo agreed to speak with Mr. Adasiewicz after the hearing. Mr. Adasiewicz stated that he does not know where Ms. Loo is and that she is possibly in New York. The Court stated that it has been serving Ms. Loo at her address of record as well as an additional address, that mail is being returned on one of the addresses and that it will continue this matter one more time to give Mr. Woo and his client a chance to see if it is in their interest to file a petition to proceed. The status of filing a status report and the orders to show cause were continued to November 3, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court requested that the parties talk to each other, that Mr. Woo see what his client would like to do to protect her interest, if they would like to petition to do so by November 3, 2015 and if not to please let the examiner know.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Continued To Nov-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Continued To Nov-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Continued To Oct-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Continued To Oct-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Continued To Oct-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Adasiewicz for (administrator) Christina Loo.

The Court stated that it was hoping Ms. Loo would be present. Mr. Adasiewicz reported that he had received a telephone call from Ms. Loo two days after the last hearing stating that she could not make it, that he has supplied information from the Franchise Tax Board (FTB) to her, that he has emailed all of the order to her and that he tried to impress the importance of this hearing. The Court stated that its interest is to get this done, that it is discouraging that she does not take it seriously and that P.C. 10953(c) allows the court to order the attorney to complete the necessary tasks. Mr. Adasiewicz stated that is lacking information needed to complete this, that the liquor licenses have been sold, that there was a lien by the FTB, that he never saw escrow, that he believes she has the funds in a bank account but has received no documentation. The Court finds Ms. Loo in contempt, she has disregarded many order of the court, she has not appeared and the court knows of nothing that excuses her appearance, she is aware of the Orders to Appear, one of the orders was returned however the orders were sent to multiple addresses including the address of record. The status of filing a status report, the Order to Appear and the Order to Show Cause were continued to October 6, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the purpose of determining appropriate sanctions regarding contempt, possibly resorting to P.C. 10953(c) to close the case and suggested that Mr. Adasiewicz take a look at everything to see what can be done and to get Ms. Loo to appear.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Status Report
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Continued To Aug-18-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Adasiewicz for (Administrator) Christina Loo.

The Court stated that there was an Order to Appear directed to Ms. Loo who is not present. Mr. Adasiewicz reported that he emailed copies of the orders, that he received a check from Ms. Loo for payment to the probate referee 3 weeks ago, that he has not received any other information, that he does not know where she currently is and does not recall where Ms. Loo sent the check from. The Court will issue an Order to Show Cause as to why Ms. Loo should not be held in contempt for August 18, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Status on filing a status report and the current Order to Appear are continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Continued To Aug-18-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Continued To Jul-21-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Adasiewicz (via court call) for (administrator) Christina Loo.

The Court asked if there has been any progress. Mr. Adasiewicz reported that Ms. Loo called him from New York 2 1/2 weeks ago, that she is in New York seeking medical help and that he has had no communication with her since then. The Court asked if its order had been served on Ms. Loo, noting that a proof of service had not been filed. Mr. Adasiewicz stated that he emailed a copy to her, that he does not have an address for her in New York for mail service, that he thought she was to be back in the middle of this month and that the only address he has is in Southern California. The Court stated that it will issue an Order to Appear and serve it at the address on record. The status on filing a status report was continued to July 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a further Order to Appear to be directed to Ms. Loo.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Status Report
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Continued To Jun-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Adasiewicz for (petioner) Christina Loo.

Mr. Adasiewicz reported that there has been some progress, that there is not enough material to finish the petition, that he would like and Order to Appear issued to the administrator to either appear or provide him with the information that he needs, that he received a spreadsheet with expenditures but no definitive if the funds were from the estate or were her personal funds and that he needs the escrow from the sale of the liquor licenses. The status on filing a status report was continued to June 23, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with an order to appear by Ms. Loo unless the petition is on file by 6/18/15. Mr. Adasiewicz is to prepare the order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Lopes. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Status Report
Off Calendar Apr-07-2015 Continued To May-12-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Adasiewicz for (petitioner) Christina Loo.

Mr. Adasiewicz reported that they have started putting material together for the actual distribution, that Ms. Loo has been slow in providing information, they need verification on expenses during the administration of the estate, that there are not enough funds to pay everyone, that there are still other issues to be resolved and requested a continuance to mid May. The court stated that it is glad that progress has been made, will grant one last continuance and that the motion to be relieved as counsel will be taken off calendar. The status on filing a status report was continued to May 12, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Continued To Mar-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Adasiewicz for and with Christina Loo.

Mr. Adasiewicz stated that he had discussion with his Client prior to the hearing and that Ms. Loo is willing to go ahead and complete the work to close out the Estate. Ms. Loo expressed concern about her sister's property being stolen by other Parties, asked why the Court had not looked into this issue, stated that she worked on her sister's estate for two years and that it devastating to her. The Court explained that it can not look at things when it is not presented to or brought before the Court and suggested Ms. Loo speak with her attorney. The order to appear is vacated. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration was continued to February 17, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition is filed no later than February 11, 2015, Ms. Loo does not need to be present.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Kelley made a special appearance for Attorney William Adasiewicz.

The Court noted that there are two judgments and a claim from Franchise Tax Board. The Court granted the status report (subject to review of the order). Filing of the next status report was set for December 9, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
